'''âj-th-s-zh''' ('''kajathsezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vantage|vantage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vantage|vantage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-th-s-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kajathsezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijathsezhoko|thijathsezhoko]] || [[word:jijathsezhoko|jijathsezhoko]] || [[word:shijathsezhoko|shijathsezhoko]] || [[word:kijathsezhoko|kijathsezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujathsezhoko|thuthujathsezhoko]] || [[word:jujujathsezhoko|jujujathsezhoko]] || [[word:shushujathsezhoko|shushujathsezhoko]] || [[word:kukujathsezhoko|kukujathsezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojathsezhoko|thojathsezhoko]] || [[word:jojathsezhoko|jojathsezhoko]] || [[word:shojathsezhoko|shojathsezhoko]] || [[word:kojathsezhoko|kojathsezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjathsezhoko|thĂŠjathsezhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjathsezhoko|jĂŠjathsezhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjathsezhoko|shĂŠjathsezhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjathsezhoko|kĂŠjathsezhoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
